name: 26W Mini Wall Pack Light with Built-In Photocell CCT 5000K
description: Ideal for Lighting: Warehouses & Factories Parking Areas & Logistics Centers Shopping Malls & Supermarkets Perimeter and Security Lighting for Commercial Buildings The ZION LED USA Mini Wall Pack is an easy-to-install, energy-saving light perfect for a variety of outdoor spaces.
short_desc: The ZION LED USA 26W Mini Wall Pack Light is a compact and efficient outdoor lighting solution. It features a built-in photocell for automatic on/off control, making it perfect for hassle-free lighting at night. Key Features: Slim Rectangle Design with built-in universal photocell Die-cast aluminum housing for durability Polycarbonate lens for clear light distribution 26W LED producing 138 lumens per watt Wide voltage input: AC 90–277V 0-10V dimmable Long life: 50,000 hours DLC listed for energy rebates
